allow: Bash(node -e "const cfg = require\('./.eslintrc.cjs'\); console.log\('ESLint config OK'\); console.log\('Root:', cfg.root\); console.log\('Parser:', cfg.parser\); console.log\('Rules count:', Object.keys\(cfg.rules\).length\)")

Bash(node -e "const cfg = require\('./.eslintrc.cjs'\); const quotes = require\('eslint'\).linter.getRules\(\).get\('quotes'\); console.log\('Quote rule from eslint:recommended:'\); console.log\(JSON.stringify\(cfg.extends, null, 2\)\); console.log\('---'\); console.log\('Explicit quotes override in rules:', cfg.rules.quotes ? cfg.rules.quotes : 'NONE'\)")

PowerShell($body = @{ email = 'skippercleancare@gmail.com'; password = 'angels2G9@84?' } | ConvertTo-Json; try { $r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri 'https://skipper-api.ghwmelite.workers.dev/api/admin/auth/login' -Method Post -Body $body -ContentType 'application/json'; "OK: token issued for $\($r.user.email\) role=$\($r.user.role\) expires_in=$\($r.expires_in\)s" } catch { "FAIL: $\($_.Exception.Message\) :: $\($_.ErrorDetails.Message\)" })
PowerShell(npx wrangler d1 execute skipper-detergents-db --remote --command "SELECT sql FROM sqlite_master WHERE type='table' AND name='products';" 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 15)

PowerShell(npx wrangler d1 execute skipper-detergents-db --remote --command "SELECT id, name, slug, is_active, is_featured, stock_quantity, unit_price, created_at FROM products ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 20;" 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 200)

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri 'https://skipper-api.ghwmelite.workers.dev/api/products?limit=5' -Method Get; "success=$\($r.success\) count=$\($r.data.products.Count\) total=$\($r.data.total\) first=$\($r.data.products[0].name\)" } catch { "FAIL: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })

PowerShell($r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri 'https://skipper-api.ghwmelite.workers.dev/api/products?limit=5' -Method Get; $r | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 4 | Select-Object -First 1; $r.data | Get-Member -MemberType NoteProperty | Select-Object Name)

PowerShell(npx wrangler d1 execute skipper-detergents-db --remote --command "SELECT id, name, slug, is_active, is_featured, is_bulk_available, stock_quantity, created_at FROM products WHERE created_at > '2026-04-25' ORDER BY created_at DESC;" 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 80)

PowerShell($r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri 'https://skipper-api.ghwmelite.workers.dev/api/products?page=1&per_page=20&sort=newest' -Method Get; "success=$\($r.success\) total=$\($r.meta.total\) returned=$\($r.data.Count\)"; $r.data | Select-Object -First 5 | ForEach-Object { "  - $\($_.name\) [is_featured=$\($_.is_featured\) created=$\($_.created_at\)]" })

PowerShell(npx wrangler d1 execute skipper-detergents-db --remote --command "SELECT action, entity_type, entity_id, datetime\(created_at\) as t FROM activity_log WHERE action LIKE '%product%' ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 15;" 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 80)

PowerShell($html = \(Invoke-WebRequest -Uri 'https://skipperdetergents.pages.dev/' -UseBasicParsing -Headers @{'Cache-Control' = 'no-cache'}\).Content; $main = [regex]::Match\($html, '/assets/index-[A-Za-z0-9_-]+\\.js'\).Value; "main bundle: $main"; $main2 = [regex]::Match\($html, '/assets/Home-[A-Za-z0-9_-]+\\.js'\).Value; "home bundle \(if pre-loaded\): $main2"; $idx = \(Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://skipperdetergents.pages.dev$main" -UseBasicParsing\).Content; "NewArrivals in index: " + \($idx -match 'NewArrival|Just arrived|Fresh on the'\))

PowerShell($html = \(Invoke-WebRequest -Uri 'https://01f8c637.skipper-storefront.pages.dev/' -UseBasicParsing\).Content; $main = [regex]::Match\($html, '/assets/index-[A-Za-z0-9_-]+\\.js'\).Value; "preview main bundle: $main"; $idx = \(Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://01f8c637.skipper-storefront.pages.dev$main" -UseBasicParsing\).Content; "Just arrived: " + \($idx -match 'Just arrived'\); "Fresh on the: " + \($idx -match 'Fresh on the'\))

PowerShell($idx = \(Invoke-WebRequest -Uri 'https://01f8c637.skipper-storefront.pages.dev/assets/index-DUdR13y4.js' -UseBasicParsing\).Content; $homeChunk = [regex]::Match\($idx, '"/assets/Home-[A-Za-z0-9_-]+\\.js"'\).Value; "home chunk: $homeChunk"; $homePath = $homeChunk.Trim\('"'\); $home = \(Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://01f8c637.skipper-storefront.pages.dev$homePath" -UseBasicParsing\).Content; "Just arrived: " + \($home -match 'Just arrived'\); "Fresh on the: " + \($home -match 'Fresh on the'\))

PowerShell($idx = \(Invoke-WebRequest -Uri 'https://01f8c637.skipper-storefront.pages.dev/assets/index-DUdR13y4.js' -UseBasicParsing\).Content; $hits = [regex]::Matches\($idx, '/assets/Home-[A-Za-z0-9_]+\\.js'\) | ForEach-Object { $_.Value }; "home chunks in main bundle: $\($hits -join ', '\)")

PowerShell($resp = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri 'https://01f8c637.skipper-storefront.pages.dev/assets/Home-DlcL1dG_.js' -UseBasicParsing -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; "status: $\($resp.StatusCode\)"; "content length: $\($resp.Content.Length\)"; "Just arrived hits: " + \([regex]::Matches\($resp.Content, 'Just arrived'\).Count\); "Fresh on the hits: " + \([regex]::Matches\($resp.Content, 'Fresh on the'\).Count\))

PowerShell($h = \(Invoke-WebRequest -Uri 'https://skipperdetergents.pages.dev/' -UseBasicParsing\).Content; $m = [regex]::Match\($h, '/assets/index-[A-Za-z0-9_-]+\\.js'\).Value; "main: $m"; $idx = \(Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://skipperdetergents.pages.dev$m" -UseBasicParsing\).Content; $homeRef = [regex]::Match\($idx, 'Home-[A-Za-z0-9_-]+\\.js'\).Value; "home chunk ref: $homeRef"; if \($homeRef\) { $hjs = \(Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://skipperdetergents.pages.dev/assets/$homeRef" -UseBasicParsing\).Content; "Just arrived: " + \([regex]::Matches\($hjs, 'Just arrived'\).Count\); "Fresh on the: " + \([regex]::Matches\($hjs, 'Fresh on the'\).Count\) })

PowerShell($r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri 'https://skipper-api.ghwmelite.workers.dev/api/products?page=1&per_page=5&sort=newest' -Method Get; "Public API now includes image_url:"; $r.data | ForEach-Object { "  - $\($_.name\) -> $\($_.image_url\)" })
